title: Sanji and Zeff’s Debt Comes to the Surface
scene: On pages 13–16, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. Sanji leaves the restaurant behind, joining Luffy’s crew while the cooks hide their emotions behind insults.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Brother Cook is sure running late.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: This is payback for all those years!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: told ya you can't beat him.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Just like that? What about saying good-byes?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: For taking care of me for so damn long!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I shall never forget for the rest of my life...

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
